L1.head: Integrating dielectric gradient metamaterials (材料科学) with advanced phase distribution engineering (物理学)
L1.claim: 整合使消色差THz金属透镜的设计成为可能

L1.head: design of achromatic THz metalenses
L1.tail: conventional chromatic and spherical aberrations as well as the diffraction limit
L1.claim: 金属透镜设计克服了传统像差和衍射极限

L1.head: overcoming aberrations and diffraction limit
L1.tail: realizing super-resolution imaging in the terahertz frequency range
L1.claim: 突破限制从而实现太赫兹超分辨成像

L1.head: synergy between metamaterials and phase engineering
L1.claim: 协同效应允许定制折射率分布

L1.head: tailored refractive index profiles
L1.tail: consistent focusing performance across 0.2–0.9 THz bandwidth
L1.claim: 定制分布保持宽频带聚焦稳定性

L1.head: maintaining focusing performance
L1.tail: practical implementations in biomedical imaging and non-destructive testing (电子、通信与自动控制技术)
L1.claim: 稳定性能推动实际应用落地

L2.head: dielectric gradient metamaterials (材料科学)
L2.claim: 梯度材料生成分级折射率分布

L2.head: graded refractive index profiles
L2.claim: 分布产生空间相位延迟

L2.head: spatial phase delay
L2.claim: 延迟补偿频率相关误差

L2.head: compensating errors
L2.claim: 误差补偿实现消色差成像

L2.head: high-precision 3D printing (电子、通信与自动控制技术)
L2.tail: fabrication of dielectric gradient metamaterials with controlled thickness and refractive index
L2.claim: 3D打印实现材料结构精确制造

L2.head: precise fabrication
L2.claim: 精确制造匹配目标相位分布

L2.head: realized phase profiles
L2.claim: 优化分布降低制造误差影响

L2.head: reduced aberrations
L2.claim: 低误差支持规模化生产和快速迭代

L3.head: joint optimization of metamaterial design (材料科学) and 3D printing parameters (电子、通信与自动控制技术)
L3.claim: 协同优化实现折射率连续梯度

L3.head: continuous refractive index gradient
L3.claim: 梯度匹配目标相位分布

L3.head: matching phase distribution
L3.claim: 分布匹配突破衍射极限

L3.head: breaking diffraction limit
L3.claim: 极限突破实现亚波长聚焦

L3.head: integration of nanopillar structures (材料科学) with nanoring arrangements (物理学)
L3.claim: 结构集成提升数值孔径

L3.head: enhanced numerical aperture
L3.tail: light confinement and reduces off-axis aberrations
L3.claim: 孔径提升增强光约束并减少像差

L3.head: 3D printing-enabled nanostructure fabrication (电子、通信与自动控制技术)
L3.claim: 制造技术扩展视场至90度

L3.head: extended field of view
L3.claim: 视场扩展同时保持数值孔径
